lane_modes.always: cross-repo; runs in BOTH composition and routing mode when the owning from-source service builds
lane_modes.composition: cross-repo; MOCK backend only — QA may list these as integration_cases
lane_modes.fast: integration-runner fast-lane suite (CASE-0xx/1xx/2xx); runs every integration PR, not resolver-selected
lane_modes.routing: cross-repo; REST->cloud backend only (cc+llm + OpenAI key); derived automatically, QA never lists it

CASE-001.gating: fast lane (integration-runner suite); not selected by the cross-repo resolver
CASE-001.intent: Fake LLM emits OpenAI-shaped response for the canned 'plus' prompt.

CASE-002.gating: fast lane (integration-runner suite); not selected by the cross-repo resolver
CASE-002.intent: Fake emits the tool_calls payload as a JSON string in content

CASE-003.intent: fake whisper returns canned transcript for known filename
